build_systems.name: GitHub Actions
build_systems.notes: ci.yml: Python unused-import/local lint, shared-library unit tests with 70% coverage gate, DDL MCP unit tests, repo-map audit on PRs, docs/design index audit, package/plugin version consistency audit, and public-surface docs/wiki audit; Markdown-only changes are not ignored. release-cli.yml: tagged GitHub release for ad-migration-shared and ad-migration-cli artifacts plus Homebrew tap formula update.

test_frameworks.name: pytest (shared)
test_frameworks.scope: Shared Python tests. Default unit run: cd lib && uv run pytest. Technology-backed integration runs use explicit paths under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.

test_frameworks.name: pytest (ddl-mcp)
test_frameworks.scope: DDL MCP tests. Default unit run: cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest. Live backend coverage runs against top-level tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ paths from the ddl-mcp project env.

test_frameworks.name: promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: LLM eval harness in tests/evals/ for migration skills and command testing. Run the curated offline smoke pass via: cd tests/evals && npm run eval:smoke

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Claude loads commands and skills via claude --plugin-dir .; Codex loads root skills/ and the local DDL MCP server through .codex-plugin/plugin.json.

plugin_manifests.description: Plugin manifests for the unified ad-migration plugin. Claude and Codex versions must match each other and the release-facing Python packages.

sandbox_backends.description: Technology-specific sandbox backends for test harness. base.py: abstract SandboxBackend interface and shared result helpers. sql_server.py and oracle.py: thin public facade classes for each dialect. sql_server_services.py and oracle_services.py: compatibility barrels plus shared low-level connection and utility helpers. *_lifecycle.py, *_execution.py, *_fixtures.py, and *_comparison.py: focused service modules that own lifecycle cloning, fixture seeding, scenario execution, SELECT execution, and SQL comparison for the public facades.

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing facade), loader_data.py (data structures for parsed DDL entries), loader_io.py (DDL I/O compatibility barrel), loader_io_support/ (manifest helpers, DDL directory loading, catalog indexing/loading, load orchestration), loader_parse.py (control-flow-aware leaf parsing and reference extraction), block_segmenter.py (T-SQL control-flow block segmentation for IF/ELSE, WHILE, TRY/CATCH, BEGIN/END), tsql_utils.py (shared T-SQL masking helpers for routing scans and segmentation), routing.py (T-SQL routing flag detection — all EXEC/control-flow regex patterns and scan_routing_flags(); extracted from catalog.py to break the catalog↔loader_parse circular import), discover.py (catalog-mandatory discover CLI/barrel for list/show/refs and write-back routing), discover_support/ (browse.py for discover list/show/refs logic split out of discover.py), view_analysis.py (sqlglot-based view SQL element extraction — JOINs, CTEs, aggregations, window functions), catalog_writer.py (schema-validated catalog write-back operations — run_write_statements, run_write_scoping, run_write_view_scoping, run_write_source, run_write_table_slice), init.py (public init CLI/facade for scaffold, hook, local env, and FreeTDS commands), init_support/ (source_config.py for SourceConfig registry; scaffold.py for project and hook scaffolding; local_env.py for .env override writes), platform.py (host platform classification for init and prerequisite guidance), freetds.py (platform-aware FreeTDS installation and unixODBC registration checks/repair for SQL Server init), init_templates.py (per-technology template functions for CLAUDE.md, README, .envrc, repo-map, pre-commit hook), catalog.py (catalog compatibility barrel), catalog_support/ (paths, typed loaders, merge helpers, reference-shape helpers, and catalog writers), catalog_preservation.py (snapshot_enriched_fields/restore_enriched_fields for re-extract field preservation), catalog_models.py (compatibility facade for catalog Pydantic contracts), catalog_model_support/ (domain-split catalog model contracts for references, diagnostics, statements, scoping, profile, enriched refactor/test_gen/generate sections, and top-level table/procedure/view/function catalogs), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_diff.py (diff-aware classification of catalog objects — hash comparison and unchanged/changed/new/removed classification), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), ddl_hash.py (deterministic DDL hashing — whitespace-normalized SHA-256 for definitions and canonical JSON for table signals), cli/ (public ad-migration command implementations, shared command output helpers, env checks, and error handling), setup_ddl.py (Typer CLI facade for setup-ddl commands), setup_ddl_support/ (split setup-ddl internals — manifest.py and extract.py are compatibility facades; manifest_io.py, runtime_identity.py, oracle_schema_summary.py, assembly.py, discovery.py, db_extraction.py, and extract_orchestration.py own manifest IO, source identity, schema summaries, DDL assembly, source discovery, extraction dispatch, and end-to-end run_extract; staging.py handles staging JSON normalization, catalog_write.py handles diff-aware catalog writes and stale marking, and db_helpers.py provides shared schema-clause and staging JSON helpers), sqlserver_extract.py (direct pyodbc extraction for SQL Server — all 13 catalog signal queries, DMF reference queries via Python loop; called by run_extract), oracle_extract.py (direct Oracle extraction orchestration facade; called by run_extract), oracle_extract_queries.py (Oracle metadata SQL builders), oracle_extract_ddl.py (DBMS_METADATA and ALL_VIEWS LONG fallback DDL helpers), oracle_extract_services.py (Oracle metadata row extraction and staging writes), migrate.py (migrate CLI/barrel for context, write, write-catalog, and render-unit-tests commands), migrate_support/ (derivation, context assembly, and artifact/render helpers split out of migrate.py), dbt_artifacts.py (shared dbt schema YAML helpers for top-level unit_tests and schema artifact serialization), profile.py (profiling CLI/barrel for table/view context and write commands), profile_support/ (seed profile helpers, table context assembly, view context assembly, and profile writeback), refactor.py (refactor CLI/barrel for context and write commands plus compatibility exports), refactor_support/ (diffing.py for symmetric diff helpers, context.py for refactor context assembly, writeback.py for refactor validation split out of refactor.py), refactor_error_codes.md (canonical `/refactor-query` surfaced-code contract shared by the command and skill), test_harness.py (test-harness CLI/barrel for sandbox lifecycle, compare-sql, write, and validate-review commands), test_harness_support/ (manifest/backend resolution, scenario execution, catalog write, and review validation helpers split out of test_harness.py), dry_run.py (migrate-util CLI facade; subcommands: status, ready, batch-plan, exclude, sync-excluded-warnings), dry_run_core.py (compatibility barrel for migrate-util command services), dry_run_support/ (split migrate-util command services: readiness.py/reset.py orchestration, reset_stage.py staged reset behavior, reset_global.py global non-preserve reset behavior, reset_files.py reset filesystem helpers, readiness_context.py object context guards, readiness_stages.py per-stage policy, reset_preserve_catalog.py preserve-catalog global reset, status, exclusions, excluded warning reconciliation, and shared helpers), batch_plan.py (migrate-util batch-plan coordinator exposing build_batch_plan and output contract: output_models.BatchPlanOutput), batch_plan_support/ (split batch-plan internals: inventory catalog enumeration, scheduling topological/phase/blocking-dependency helpers, node output builders, diagnostics aggregation, and dashboard status summary), deps.py (transitive dependency traversal — collect_deps, _expand_view_refs, _expand_proc_refs, dbt model detection helpers), pipeline_status.py (pipeline stage status and diagnostics — object_pipeline_status, collect_object_diagnostics, _compute_status_and_diagnostics with deduplication), diagnostic_reviews.py (stable reviewed-warning identity, catalog/diagnostic-reviews.json read/write helpers, reviewed warning filtering support), runtime_config.py and runtime_config_models.py (typed manifest/runtime contract for independent source, target, sandbox, and extraction sections), target_setup.py (setup-target public orchestration facade), target_setup_support/ (split setup-target internals — runtime.py for target runtime manifest and rerun guard, dbt_scaffold.py for dbt project/profile rendering, source_tables.py for target source-table specs/materialization, seeds.py compatibility facade, seed_specs.py/seed_rendering.py/seed_export.py/seed_commands.py for seed spec loading, artifact rendering, export, and dbt seed execution, dbt_commands.py for dbt compile/build validation), replicate_source_tables.py (deterministic source-to-target source table replication planner/executor for the public CLI), dbops/ (technology-specific database operation adapters for SQL Server, Oracle, and DuckDB plus fixture materialization script resolution), generate_sources.py (generate-sources CLI/public orchestration facade), generate_sources_support/ (split generate-sources internals — candidates.py for catalog classification and namespace validation, sources_yaml.py for dbt sources.yml construction and tests/freshness/relationships, staging.py for staging wrappers, staging model YAML, unit-test rendering, stale cleanup, artifact writing, and generated dbt selectors), env_config.py (git-repo assertion, project-root/dbt-path/ddl-dir/catalog-dir resolution with env-var overrides), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization), db_connect.py (public sql_server_connect + oracle_connect connection factories — shared by setup_ddl, sqlserver_extract, oracle_extract), context_helpers.py (shared catalog context loaders: load_table_profile, load_proc_statements, load_proc_body, load_table_columns, collect_source_tables, sandbox_metadata, load_test_spec — used by migrate.py, refactor_support/context.py), cli_utils.py (shared emit function for JSON stdout output — used by all CLI modules), output_models/ (domain-split Pydantic output contract package with compatibility barrel at shared.output_models), diagnostics/ (extensible diagnostics package — __init__.py compatibility barrel + CLI; registry.py registry/decorator/result types; context.py catalog/DDL context helpers; runner.py two-pass check execution and result writes; common.py (cross-dialect diagnostic registration facade), common_support/ (object checks, reference checks, graph helpers, dependency checks); sqlserver.py: 8 SQL Server dialect-specific checks; oracle.py: Oracle-specific checks (LONG_TRUNCATION, PACKAGE_MEMBER, PIPELINED_FUNCTION); materialized_views bucket supported across known FQNs, object buckets, and reference resolution).

output_contracts.description: Pydantic v2 models (extra=forbid) for CLI output contracts, split by domain with a compatibility barrel at shared.output_models. Catalog input contracts are exposed through catalog_models.py and implemented under catalog_model_support/.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body. ddl_mcp_support/ contains the standalone env/name-resolution helpers plus loader facade, loader_data, loader_io, loader_parse, block_segmenter, routing, and tsql_utils modules copied into the MCP package so its lockfile no longer depends on the broader editable shared runtime package.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: listing-objects/ (catalog browsing — list objects by type), analyzing-table/ (scoping — auto-detects table vs view; tables: writer discovery, procedure analysis, statement resolution; views: SQL element extraction, call tree, logic summary), generating-model/ (dbt model generation from refactored SQL, staging + mart split), planning-refactor-mart/ (planning-only mart-domain refactor candidate plan generation with markdown contract under references/plan-file-contract.md), applying-staging-candidate/ (candidate-scoped staging execution for approved refactor-mart staging candidates), applying-mart-candidates/ (internal higher-layer execution for one approved intermediate or mart candidate from a refactor-mart plan), profiling-table/ (profiling — auto-detects table vs view; tables: 6 questions including classification, PK, watermark, FKs, PII; views: stg/mart classification; references/ contains classification guides for fact_accumulating_snapshot and fact_periodic_snapshot disambiguation), generating-tests/ (single-table and view-backed test generation with fixture synthesis, write-through test_harness persistence, and mixed prompt support), reviewing-tests/ (LLM quality gate for test specs and review-result validation across table and view scenarios), reviewing-diagnostics/ (table-centric diagnostic review — inspects one table's status warnings, fixes catalog state when possible, or writes reviewed-warning artifacts), test-invariants/ (shared generator-reviewer contract for branch authority, cross-artifact consistency, and narrow repair), verifying-completion-claims/ (non-user-invocable completion-claim evidence gate), reviewing-model/ (dbt model review with structured feedback, stable reference codes, and acknowledgements protocol; references/ contains style guidelines), refactoring-sql/ (CTE restructuring with equivalence audit). _shared/references/dialects/ contains dialect-specific references (tsql/ and oracle/) for statement classification and routine migration patterns; skills read dialect from manifest.json to select the right file.

migration_commands.description: Claude-only stage-specific slash commands (LLM-driven only): scope-tables.md, profile-tables.md, generate-model.md, generate-tests.md, refactor-query.md, refactor-mart-plan.md, refactor-mart.md, status.md. Whole-mart orchestration commands: migrate-mart-plan.md writes the resumable migration plan and migrate-mart.md executes it. Deterministic setup and state-mutation commands have moved to the ad-migration CLI (lib/shared/cli/). Codex command-surface rationale is documented in docs/reference/codex-plugin-surface/README.md.

tests_migration.description: Shared-library unit pytest suite organized by module under tests/unit/<module>/. Each module directory contains focused test files split by responsibility (e.g. test_harness/ covers CLI behavior, sandbox facades/services, registry resolution, views/compare helpers, and write CLI behavior; catalog_models/ covers catalog preservation, scoping, and profile contract models; context_helpers/ covers shared context loading and LLM-facing column visibility; diagnostics/ has test_diagnostics.py, test_diagnostics_oracle.py, test_diagnostics_sqlserver.py; dry_run/ splits readiness service and CLI coverage across test_readiness.py and test_readiness_cli.py, and discover/ splits command-path behavior across focused files with area-local helper modules). Shared fixtures that support multiple modules remain under tests/unit/fixtures/. Shared pytest plumbing lives in tests/conftest.py. oracle_mcp_config/ locks the repository Oracle MCP config and install-doc fallback contract.

tests_migration_integration.description: Shared-library integration pytest suite organized by backend and module under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.

tests_evals.description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing against MigrationTest schema. Per-scenario fixtures live under fixtures/<package>/<scenario-slug>/; runnable configs live in packages/ plus the standalone oracle-live/ and mssql-live/ live suites, while Oracle regression fixtures live under fixtures/oracle-regression/ and are consumed by the owning package configs. classifying-data-domains covers the whole-warehouse DDL input guard and warehouse-catalog persistence boundary; verifying-completion-claims covers generic verified/downgraded/blocked completion-claim evidence decisions without per-command wiring; planning-refactor-mart covers the /refactor-mart-plan planning workflow; applying-staging-candidate and cmd-refactor-mart cover staging-wave refactor-mart execution. cmd-migrate-mart-plan and cmd-migrate-mart cover whole-mart planning/resume orchestration. Assertions live under tests/evals/assertions/, including schema-helpers.js, check-guard-stop.js, check-completion-claim-guidance.js, check-refactor-mart-plan.js, and check-refactor-mart-stg-execution.js for shared path, term, claim-guidance, plan-shape, status writeback, and no-mutation checks. No top-level Promptfoo config — use npm run eval:smoke for the curated offline pass.

tests_ddl_mcp.description: DDL MCP pytest suite. Unit coverage lives under mcp/ddl/tests/unit/. Live backend coverage lives under top-level tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ and runs from the ddl-mcp project env.

scripts.description: Repository scripts. worktree.sh is the maintainer development helper. bootstrap_repo_local_env.py fingerprints repo-local manifests/lockfiles and refreshes the lib, mcp/ddl, and tests/evals dependency environments only when stale. stage-worktree.sh, stage-pr.sh, stage-pr-merge.sh, and stage-cleanup.sh are deterministic plugin runtime helpers used from customer projects. contributor-setup.sh is the contributor readiness helper; validate_plugin_manifests.py validates Claude/Codex manifest contracts; check_design_index.py, check_public_surface_docs.py, and check_version_consistency.py audit repository metadata drift; publish-sqlserver-image.sh and demo-warehouse/ support SQL Server fixtures and demos.

docker_sqlserver.description: Dockerfile for SQL Server test image. Pins a specific CU tag and COPYs pre-built MDF/LDF data files so KimballFixture is immediately available on docker run; the canonical MigrationTest fixture is materialized later as a schema inside the configured SQL Server database. data/ is ephemeral (gitignored) — produced by scripts/publish-sqlserver-image.sh during the build.

docs.description: Documentation. Canonical locations: docs/design/ for design docs, docs/functional/ for functional specs, docs/plans/ for implementation plans, docs/reference/ for reference docs, and docs/wiki/ for end-user docs. docs/design/README.md defines the keep criteria for durable agent-facing design notes. docs/AGENTS.md defines index maintenance rules for documentation directories with multiple child folders.

test_fixtures.description: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture for integration testing and demos. schema/ has DDL for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL (staging, dim, fact, gold tables + views). data/baseline/ has seed INSERT SQL per dialect (extracted from AdventureWorks2022). data/delta/ has 5 incremental scenarios (new-customer-product, scd2-address-change, scd1-name-correction, late-arriving-fact, dedup-staging). procedures/ has 20-21 stored procedures per dialect covering 11 pattern categories (standard load, CTE, join, set ops, subquery, aggregate, pivot, control flow, exec chain, view-backed, error conditions). scripts/ has csv_to_inserts.py (extraction + generation tool). parity/ has validate.py (cross-dialect parity validation script — runs full orchestrator on sql-test/oracle-test/pg-test and compares all 20 output tables across baseline and 5 delta rounds) and coverage-matrix.md (procedure → pattern category mapping).

key_directories..claude-plugin/: Claude Code plugin manifest at the repository root
key_directories..codex-plugin/: Codex plugin manifest at the repository root; supports root skills/ and .mcp.json discovery.
key_directories.commands/: Claude Code command specs at the repository root; intentionally Claude-only for Codex.
key_directories.skills/: Claude Code and Codex skills at the repository root
key_directories.scripts/: Repository scripts. worktree.sh is the maintainer development helper; stage-worktree.sh, stage-pr.sh, stage-pr-merge.sh, and stage-cleanup.sh are deterministic plugin runtime helpers used from customer projects; validate_plugin_manifests.py validates Claude/Codex plugin manifest contracts; check_version_consistency.py audits package and plugin version drift.
key_directories.lib/: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
key_directories.packages/: Packaging wrappers for the public ad-migration CLI and internal plugin entrypoints.
key_directories.lib/shared/schemas/: JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/unit/: Shared-library unit pytest suite organized by module under tests/unit/<module>/.
key_directories.tests/integration/: Shared-library integration pytest suite organized by backend and module under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.
key_directories.tests/integration/scoping-inputs/: JSON fixture inputs for scoping-logic tests and regressions.
key_directories.tests/evals/: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing (skill packages include listing-objects, profiling-table, generating-model, planning-refactor-mart, applying-staging-candidate, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table, analyzing-table-readiness, classifying-data-domains; command packages include cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests, cmd-refactor, cmd-refactor-mart, cmd-migrate-mart-plan, cmd-migrate-mart, cmd-status, cmd-reset-migration)
key_directories.mcp/ddl/tests/: DDL MCP pytest suite split into tests/unit/ plus shared top-level backend coverage under tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ executed from the ddl-mcp project env.
key_directories.mcp/ddl/ddl_mcp_support/: Standalone support slice for the DDL MCP package: local env/path helpers, name normalization, and focused loader/parser modules copied from the shared runtime split to keep parser fixes portable while preserving the MCP dependency boundary.
key_directories.scripts/demo-warehouse/: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture: schema DDL, baseline seed data, and delta scenarios for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL
key_directories.docs/design/: Design docs. Durable agent-facing design notes only; keep criteria are documented in docs/design/README.md
key_directories.docs/functional/: Functional specs. Keep docs/functional/README.md updated when adding files or removing folders under this tree.
key_directories.docs/plans/: Implementation plans written from approved designs before execution begins.
key_directories.docs/reference/: Reference docs for operators and contributors.
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules such as coding-conventions, git-workflow, logging-policy, and codex-execution-policy
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for repo-local Claude Code skills

commands.ad_migration_setup_source: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration setup-source --schemas silver,gold
commands.ad_migration_setup_target: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration setup-target [--source-schema bronze]
commands.ad_migration_setup_sandbox: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration setup-sandbox [--yes]
commands.ad_migration_teardown_sandbox: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration teardown-sandbox [--yes]
commands.ad_migration_doctor_drivers: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration doctor drivers [--project-root <path>] [--json]
commands.ad_migration_reset: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration reset <stage|all> [fqn ...] [--preserve-catalog] [--yes]
commands.ad_migration_replicate_source_tables: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration replicate-source-tables --limit <n> [--select <fqn>] [--exclude <fqn>] [--filter <fqn=predicate>] [--dry-run] [--json] [--yes]
commands.ad_migration_exclude_table: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration exclude-table <fqn> [--no-commit]
commands.ad_migration_add_source_table: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration add-source-table <fqn> [--no-commit]
commands.ad_migration_add_seed_table: cd packages/ad-migration-cli && uv run ad-migration add-seed-table <fqn>
commands.discover_list: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover list --type <type>
commands.discover_show: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover show --name <fqn>
commands.discover_refs: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover refs --name <fqn>
commands.discover_write_scoping: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover write-scoping --name <fqn> --scoping-file <path>
commands.discover_write_slice: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover write-slice --proc <proc_fqn> --table <target_table_fqn> --slice-file <path>
commands.discover_write_statements: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run discover write-statements --name <procedure_name> --statements-file <path>
commands.init_check_freetds: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run init check-freetds [--register-missing]
commands.init_scaffold_project: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run init scaffold-project --project-root . --technology <technology>
commands.init_scaffold_hooks: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run init scaffold-hooks --project-root . --technology <technology>
commands.init_write_local_env_overrides: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run init write-local-env-overrides --project-root . --overrides-json <json>
commands.migrate_context: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate context [<args>]
commands.migrate_write: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate write [<args>]
commands.migrate_write_catalog: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate write-catalog [<args>]
commands.migrate_render_unit_tests: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate render-unit-tests [<args>]
commands.profile_context: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run profile context [<args>]
commands.profile_write: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run profile write [<args>]
commands.test_harness_execute_spec: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness execute-spec --spec <path>
commands.migrate_util_status: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate-util status [<fqn>]
commands.migrate_util_ready: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate-util ready <stage> [--object <fqn>]
commands.migrate_util_exclude: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate-util exclude <fqn> [fqn ...]
commands.migrate_util_reset_migration: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate-util reset-migration <scope|profile|generate-tests|refactor|all> [--fqn <fqn> ...]
commands.migrate_util_sync_excluded_warnings: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run migrate-util sync-excluded-warnings
commands.refactor_context: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run refactor context --table <schema.table>
commands.refactor_write: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run refactor write --table <schema.table> --refactored-sql-file <path> --status ok|partial|error
commands.compare_sql: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness compare-sql --sql-a-file <extracted.sql> --sql-b-file <refactored.sql> --spec <spec-path>
commands.test_harness_sandbox_status: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness sandbox-status
commands.test_harness_validate_review: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness validate-review --review-file <path>
commands.test_harness_write: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness write --table <table_fqn> --branches <n> --unit-tests <n> --spec <path>
commands.test_harness_compare_sql: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run test-harness compare-sql --sql-a-file <extracted.sql> --sql-b-file <refactored.sql> --spec <spec-path>
commands.profile_view_context: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run profile view-context --view <view_fqn>
commands.setup_ddl_write_partial_manifest: cd packages/ad-migration-internal && uv run setup-ddl write-partial-manifest --project-root . --technology <technology> --target-technology <technology> --prereqs-json <json>

conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-dir . CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the repository root.
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Two pytest suites: (1) shared lib — default unit run: cd lib && uv run pytest; path-scoped runs: ../tests/unit/<module> and ../tests/integration/<technology>/<module>. (2) DDL MCP server — default unit run: cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest; live backend runs target ../../../tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever any entry here becomes stale, especially after architecture, entrypoint, command, module, package, test/eval layout, or documentation-index changes.
